title: PMWU-EAS
description: PMWU-EAS (Emergency Alert System) allows users to receive SWS/SVR [PDS & DST]/TOR [PDS & TORE] warnings in chat, along with overlaying warning polygons on radar.
body:
# Introduction
PMWU-EAS brings a fully functional Emergency Alert System to the game, delivering Special Weather Statements, Severe Thunderstorm Warnings (including PDS and Destructive), and Tornado Warnings (including PDS and Tornado Emergency) directly to chat, alongside warning polygon overlays on radar. Mesoscale Discussions and Watches are also received in chat. To receive alerts, simply have the EAS Receiver in your inventory and turned on — right-click with it in hand to toggle

# Commands
![Storm & Warning Diagnostics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00f74d920e0a380f3951b00ca4ce3ec16645638a.png)
![Spotter Reports](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd450202185213db1ef3aa893620a1bf067aced1.png)

# Requirements
- ProtoManly's Weather

# Support
Support for all PMWU mods are available within the [PMWU Support Discord](https://discord.gg/UmuhrS7vkU) server.

# Extra
This mod is apart of the PMWU modline, which was created to add multiple addon mods to [ProtoManly's Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather). All PMWU mods are compatible with each other, but they have not been tested for compatability with other PMW sidemods.

This mod has been vigorously tested, but bugs may still appear. If you encounter a bug, please submit it to the [PMWU Support Discord](https://discord.gg/UmuhrS7vkU) server in a ticket.
